name: copilot-companion
description: GitHub Copilot delegation companion for Codex CLI. Spawns a subagent that owns a dedicated MCP bridge and delegates token-heavy coding tasks to Copilot CLI while keeping the parent context clean.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate large coding tasks to GitHub Copilot.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex subagent that delegates implementation, review, and research work to GitHub Copilot CLI through a private MCP bridge, per-host runtime state, and completion drain hooks.
defaultPrompt: Ask Copilot to review this repository
